hero.description: Passionate in building digital systems and interactive learning experiences for modern education.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a Lecturer and Full-Stack Developer with experience building digital systems and interactive web applications.
about.p2: My work focuses on developing scalable platforms, real-time systems, and technology-driven learning solutions.
about.p3: I believe technology should not only solve problems but also enhance how people learn and interact.
about.p4: Currently, I combine academic teaching with practical system development, bridging education and technology.

roles.title: Founder & Lead Developer – BIBSPORT
points: Architected and developed a full-scale sports event platform.
Implemented real-time GPS tracking, automated payments, and ticketing systems.
Designed scalable infrastructure and deployment pipelines.

roles.title: Lecturer
points: Teaching Media Pembelajaran with focus on digital and interactive systems.
Integrating technology-driven approaches into classroom learning.

roles.title: Freelance Full-Stack Developer
points: Architecting scalable web applications using Laravel and Node.js.
Building real-time systems and payment integrations.
Deploying production-ready applications using Docker and Nginx.

roles.title: Founder – Gin Invitation
points: Built and scaled a digital invitation platform.
Focused on SEO optimization and performance improvement.
